intro.title: BTC 3-Body 7-Code AI Wellness Center
intro.subTitle: This service provides voice guidance for a seamless measurement process. Please clear your surroundings and press the button below.
intro.mainSubTitle: AI Body Balance & Health Status Assessment System

userInfo.title: Register New Participant
userInfo.name: NAME
userInfo.agreeNotice: Enter your contact details to receive your AI Diagnosis Report on your mobile device instantly!
userInfo.agreeRequire: [Required] I agree to the collection and use of personal information.
userInfo.privacyItemsDetail: Name, gender, birth year/month, contact information (optional), full-body/facial photos, brain cognitive response data, 7-Code selection results.
userInfo.privacyPurposeDetail: Integrated 3-Body balance measurement, wellness status analysis, and comparative analysis with previous records.
userInfo.privacyRetentionDetail:
• Regular Members: Retained for the duration of membership (destroyed within 3 months upon cancellation).
• Trial Visitors: Automatically destroyed 6 months after the measurement date.
userInfo.privacyThirdPartyDetail: Photos are temporarily transmitted to Google LLC servers (USA) for AI analysis and are deleted immediately upon completion.
userInfo.privacyRightsDetail: You may refuse consent; however, if you do, you will not be able to use the 3-Body Wellness Measurement Service.
userInfo.wellnessNotice: ※ This system is a wellness program designed to measure posture, movement, and memory to assist with health management, and is not intended for medical diagnosis.
userInfo.selectMemberAlert: Please select an existing member above
userInfo.errorBirth: Please enter your date of birth.
userInfo.errorConsent: Please agree to the collection and use of personal information.

Raise your right hand when you see a green light, raise your left hand when you see a blue light, and raise both hands when you see a white light. Do not move when you see a red light. Please stand so your upper body is visible on the camera.

speech.shoppingStart: Now, find and click the {{count}} items you just saw.

brainTest.raiseLeftHand: Please raise your left hand above your head

brainTest.raiseLeftSec: 🔵 Raise left hand above shoulder for 1s

healthNeeds.title: Primary Areas of Focus for Your Health & Well-being

healthNeeds.subNotice: Multiple choices allowed. You can also type in your own focus area below.

sevenCode.title: 7-CODE Health Checklist

sevenCode.subNotice: Feel free to choose the words that intuitively resonate with you.

systemCheck.title: PC Specification Check
systemCheck.cameraCheckDesc:
Make sure your entire body, from head to toe, is visible on the screen.
If you are alone, press the "5-Sec Auto Capture" button in the center.
Move to a position where your full body is visible within the time limit to complete the test.
systemCheck.checkDoneDesc:
All diagnostic environments are ready.
Proceeding to the main system.

assessment.completeSubText: Review your measurement details below and start the AI analysis.
assessment.notCompleteTitle: Some tests are not completed yet
assessment.notCompleteSubText: You need to complete all tests to start AI comprehensive analysis.
assessment.dataSaveNotice: 💾 Measurement data will be saved automatically when the analysis starts.
assessment.dataSaveSub: Even if an analysis error occurs, you can re-analyze using the saved data without retaking measurements.
assessment.liteSub: AI Body Balance & Health Status Assessment System
assessment.introGuidance: This is the AI Body Balance and Health Status Assessment System.
assessment.postureFrontGuidance: Please stand facing forward so your entire body is visible.
assessment.postureSideGuidance: Please stand sideways and align your center of gravity.
assessment.balanceTestGuidance: Close your eyes and stand on one foot to maintain your balance.
assessment.brainMemoryGuidance: Memorize the grocery items for 10 seconds, then select and place them in your cart.
assessment.faceAnalysisGuidance: Please remove your glasses and mask. You may brighten the lights. Place your face close to the camera and look straight ahead.
assessment.sevenCodeCheckGuidance: Please select the items that apply to you.
assessment.bodyNotVisibleDetail: Full body is not fully visible. Please step back and try again.
assessment.bodyNotVisibleSpeech: Full body is not fully visible. Please step back and try again.
assessment.personNotFoundDetail: AI did not clearly recognize a person. If the photo looks fine, you may manually proceed to the next step.
assessment.personNotFoundSpeech: AI did not clearly recognize a person. If the photo looks fine, you may manually proceed to the next step.
assessment.jointsDetected: AI detected {{count}} joints. Suitable for analysis.
assessment.allTestsDoneSpeech: All measurements completed. Please press the analysis button on the screen.

This system is a wellness program designed to measure posture, movement, and memory to assist with health management, and is not intended for medical diagnosis. Analysis takes about 1 minute.

report.crossValidationComplete: Cross-validation complete for 6 core conditions: posture, balance, cognitive response, and facial aging.
report.postureBalanceChartUnlock: A detailed 3D Balance Map will be unlocked upon request for consultation.
report.detailedSolutionLocked: 🔒 Detailed solutions and advice will be unlocked upon request for professional consultation.
report.eyesClosedImportanceTitle: Importance of Standing on One Foot with Eyes Closed & Root Causes of Instability
report.eyesClosedImportanceDesc: Standing on one foot with eyes closed is a crucial aging screening metric. By blocking visual input, it comprehensively tests the body's proprioception (somatosensory system), the inner ear's vestibular system, and the cerebellum/cerebral functions that coordinate them.
report.eyesClosedImportanceDetail: An average or low score in this metric indicates not only a simple lack of muscle strength, but also a decrease in the supporting power of the thighs and core, a slower signal transmission rhythm of the proprioceptive nerves, or accumulated body alignment imbalances. Additionally, high brain fatigue caused by insomnia or general exhaustion significantly reduces balance maintenance.
report.brainGuideLocked: 🔒 Detailed Brain Cognitive Health Guide Locked
report.brainGuideUnlockNotice: The Prefrontal Cortex Activation Guide will be unlocked upon request for professional consultation.
report.workingMemoryDesc: The Grocery Shopping Memory Test measures the working memory capacity of the hippocampus and prefrontal cortex. It comprehensively evaluates your ability to accurately recall 8 items while performing arithmetic distractions and mental calculations.
report.memoryGuideUnlockNotice: The detailed memory guide will be unlocked during your professional consultation.
report.facialDetailAfterConsult: Detailed results will be revealed after requesting a professional consultation.
report.threeBodySubtitle: Integrated Balance Status of Physical, Energy, and Brain Dimensions
report.sevenCodeSubtitle: Analyzing your energy flow through 7 unique codes
report.coreRecommendationTitle: Core Analysis of Today's Checkup (Weakest Code Recharge Guide)
report.coreRecommendationDesc: Out of your 7 energy axes, the area that currently requires the most activation is **{{codeName}}**.
report.solutionGuideDesc: Based on your analysis, we guide you through customized meditation and training movements for your Body, Mind, and Brain.
report.brainExerciseTitle: Brain — Brain Function Training & Cognitive Enhancement
report.programBodyFreeDesc: A course to facilitate physical energy circulation and smooth Qi/blood flow.
report.programCleanBreathDesc: A course for Dantian breathing, chest relaxation, and emotional release.
report.programMindFreeDesc: A course for stress management and establishing inner stability.

report.mobileAppNotice: Connect to our mobile app (coming soon) to receive detailed comparison graphs with your next assessment results.
report.mobileAppComingSoon: 📱 Mobile App Support Coming Soon / Smart History Management Service Coming Soon
report.appStoreDesc: A precision history management app is launching soon. Look out for it in the App Store / Google Play Store.
report.legalDisclaimerDesc: These results are wellness screening metrics designed to help you self-manage by identifying your bioenergy and body balance status. This is not a medical device analysis under the Medical Device Act, nor is it a medical practice under the Medical Service Act. This report does not replace disease prevention, medical analysis, adjustment, or treatment.

c1.name: Code 1 (Huiyin)
c1.symptom: Lack of foundational energy, weakness in legs, and instability in spinal support.
c1.hint: Recharge your foundational energy with squats and grounding exercises that press your soles flat against the floor while engaging your lower abdomen (Lower Dantian Grounding).
c1.label: Base Energy

c2.name: Code 2 (Lower Dantian)
c2.symptom: Depleted vitality, coldness in the lower abdomen, and stagnant energy due to poor bowel function.
c2.hint: Ignite the fire in your lower abdomen through Dantian tapping and abdominal breathing meditation.
c2.label: Core Vitality

c3.name: Code 3 (Zhongwan)
c3.symptom: Decreased willpower, chronic indigestion, and lack of drive.
c3.hint: Boost your willpower with Zhongwan relaxation exercises and core strengthening workouts.
c3.label: Willpower

c4.name: Code 4 (Shanzhong)
c4.symptom: Emotional stagnation, chest tightness, and accumulated chronic anger/stress.
c4.hint: Release pent-up anger and stress through chest-opening meditation and deep relaxation breathing.
c4.label: Emotional Balance

c5.name: Code 5 (Hunmen)
c5.symptom: Stagnant self-expression, chronic neck/shoulder tension, and emotional communication barriers.
c5.hint: Unblock your neck channel with neck and shoulder relaxation movements and sound meditation.
c5.label: Expression & Flow

c6.name: Code 6 (Yintang)
c6.symptom: Decline in intuition, heavy head, and reduced prefrontal inhibitory control.
c6.hint: Clear your head with Yintang massage and brain gymnastics.
c6.label: Insight & Focus

c7.name: Code 7 (Baihui)
c7.region: Crown of the Head / Brainwaves / Pineal Gland
c7.symptom: Unstable integrated energy, sleep disorders, and brainwave imbalance/overload.
c7.hint: Align your center with Baihui brain breathing and brainwave relaxation meditation.
c7.label: Life Direction

reasons.r1: Pelvic misalignment detected; lower body structural support unstable; diminished balance stability.
reasons.r2: Circulatory stagnation in the pelvic region; lower abdominal core weakness; accelerated biological aging indicators.
reasons.r3: Torso/spine alignment imbalance; decreased core muscle execution stability.
reasons.r4: Shoulder asymmetry detected; upper chest/core stabilization efficiency decreased.
reasons.r5: Cervical spine/forward neck posture detected; persistent neck-shoulder muscle tightness observed.
reasons.r6: Delayed cognitive response latency; reduced prefrontal inhibitory control; expression wrinkles visible around the eyes/forehead.
reasons.r7: Slight delay in working memory recall (hippocampus); facial fatigue indicators and reduced skin elasticity detected.
